item.name: Ku'uxage Bitterling
item.description:
This variety of bitterling has a habit of leaping through the waterfalls of Ku'uxage.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 1 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: While bitterlings are commonly found throughout the waterways of Yok Tural, those in Ku'uxage possess a unique hunting habit. The wavekin often leap through the foamy spray of waterfalls, catching any insects in their path.
